message:
fix(func,core): Kahan-Babuska-Neumaier summation for SUM/AVG/total precision

Replace simple Kahan summation with magnitude-aware KBN algorithm matching
C SQLite's kahanBabuskaNeumaierStep (func.c:1871). Three fixes:

1. agg_builtins.rs kahan_add(): magnitude-aware error term selection
2. agg_builtins.rs SUM/AVG/total finalize: add compensation term (sum+err)
3. connection.rs compute_aggregate(): KBN summation for fallback GROUP BY

Previously SUM(qty * price) over JOINed tables produced 209.82000000000002
instead of 209.82 due to floating-point accumulation errors.

Add 25 new conformance oracle tests in separate integration test file
covering: hex/bitwise, CAST, LIKE/GLOB, total/COUNT DISTINCT, EXCEPT/
INTERSECT, UPDATE self-ref, LEFT JOIN IS NULL, REPLACE, savepoints,
DEFAULT expressions, string functions, numeric edges, complex WHERE,
ALTER TABLE, subqueries, INSERT variations, DELETE patterns, DML
sequences, recursive CTEs, multi-join aggregates, ORDER BY advanced,
UPSERT, CASE expressions, index queries, datetime functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
